basics.name: Devika Sunitha
basics.label: Technical Writing Team Manager
basics.summary: Experienced Technical Writer with 15 years in the IT industry and a strong managerial background, seeking a challenging role to apply expertise in documentation and knowledge management. Proven track record in leading Learning and Development projects, crafting tailored content for diverse verticals, and coordinating website development initiatives.

work.name: Jocata
work.summary: Led Technical Writing and Content Development function, driving documentation governance, AI transformation, and enterprise-wide learning initiatives.
highlights: Established and scaled the Technical Writing function from the ground up, defining team vision, structure, and operating model
Designed and implemented end-to-end documentation governance process introducing standardized workflows and review mechanisms
Developed enterprise-wide branded documentation templates and style guides improving consistency across all documentation
Spearheaded AI transformation strategy integrating generative AI into documentation workflows to improve productivity and turnaround time

work.name: ADF
work.summary: Led technical documentation initiatives for the Chennai branch, standardizing documentation practices and fostering cross-functional collaboration.
highlights: Initiated comprehensive documentation for the Chennai branch customizing content for support teams
Championed standardized documentation practices focusing on clarity and effectiveness
Fostered collaboration implementing versatile document templates with cross-functional teams

work.name: Flytxt
work.summary: Authored technical documentation and user materials for product offerings while ensuring quality and consistency.
highlights: Authored and updated technical documentation for products enhancing critical information accessibility
Produced user manuals, installation guides, and architectural diagrams for diverse user needs
Conducted meticulous reviews ensuring accuracy, clarity, and consistency in technical content

work.name: QBurst
work.summary: Gathered and analyzed business requirements, translating them into technical specifications and project documentation.
highlights: Actively participated in requirement gathering ensuring comprehensive understanding of project specifications
Translated business needs into actionable technical requirements collaborating with clients
Contributed detailed functional specifications and user stories to project documentation

work.name: TCS
work.summary: Supported World Bank project operations and contributed to team delivery through effective collaboration and rapid advancement.
highlights: Monitored World Bank project swiftly identifying and addressing alerts to ensure seamless operation
Achieved promotion to Assistant Project Lead within one year showcasing rapid learning and effective leadership
Collaborated with diverse global team ensuring successful project delivery through effective teamwork
